prose.en: Providers MUST include FedRAMP Certification Reports with their FedRAMP Certification Data without inappropriate modifications, and make such reports available within 2 weeks of receiving the materials from FedRAMP.

note.en: FedRAMP provides Certification Reports for all cloud service offerings following the Program Certification path as part of the initial and ongoing FedRAMP Certification process, and may provide Certification Reports for cloud service offerings following the Agency Certification path.
